sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4611" key="a)lohte/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλο-ητέα</orth>, <sense id="n4611.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must thresh,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:226" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.226</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
